MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Harry Gowe III, Esq., Deputy Attorney General, 415-703-1336 for defendant and moving party THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE.
Jose Ayala, 323-788-0542, plaintiff and opposing party appearing in propria persona.

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. CLAIMS ARE BARRED BY STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. BUSCH, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR# 1558. (301/BUSCH/CK)
CORRECTION: PLAINTIFF FAILED TO COMPLY WITH PRE-FILING REQUIREMENT OF THE TORT CLAIMS ACT. CLAIMS WERE REQUIRED TO BE BROUGHT IN EARLIER ACTION.
